claudeRiskReview.summary: Claude confirmed Feishu ingress must not be enabled because no real separate non-production Feishu test app/robot/callback proof exists. Synthetic proof smoke is not sufficient.

blockingConditions.name: real_independent_test_surface_not_proven
blockingConditions.reason: No real Feishu test app/robot/callback fingerprint was supplied or found. Synthetic proof smoke is not evidence of a real test surface.

blockingConditions.name: shadow_matches_production_feishu_app
blockingConditions.reason: Shadow and old prod currently have the same Feishu appId fingerprint and same FEISHU_APP_SECRET relation. Enabling shadow Feishu would risk production dual consumption.

blockingConditions.name: old_prod_feishu_still_active
blockingConditions.reason: Old prod has Feishu channel/plugin enabled and remains the production rollback anchor.

actionsNotTaken: Did not enable shadow Feishu channel or plugin.
Did not modify Feishu callback, env, systemd, config, or secrets.
Did not restart or reload openclaw-benben.service.
Did not stop, restart, reload, or modify openclaw-gateway.service.
Did not send any Feishu message.
Did not run a provider/model network call.
Did not print raw Feishu app ids or secret values.
requiredNextEvidence: Create or identify a real non-production Feishu test app/robot that is not the current production benben bot.
Compute SHA-256 fingerprints locally for the test app id, optional bot id, and optional callback URL without committing or printing raw values.
Run the proof checker on the filled proof and require ok=true with app_id_sha256_relation=different.
Only after that, open a separate L3 gate for receive-only/dry-run Feishu canary configuration.
